mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer spending, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in >60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and business demand expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST yields negative forward returns in >55% of cases over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in the index of industrial production reflects immediate supply-side bottlenecks and reduced corporate output, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines are followed by positive 5-day returns in >65% of observations during high inflation periods.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real gross domestic product confirms sustained economic expansion and corporate earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth periods show negative forward returns in >50% of cases over a 10-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Increasing total nonfarm payrolls combined with a declining unemployment rate confirms robust labor market tightening, supporting positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative 60-day returns in >60% of triggered instances across multiple business cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production exceeding the 105 index threshold indicates strong manufacturing capacity utilization and supply chain efficiency, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO values above 105 are followed by negative 5-day returns in >55% of observations during low inflation periods.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price index growth forces expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL acceleration is followed by positive 20-day returns in >60% of cases during tightening cycles.
